severity: Major | Medium | Minor | Pending — auto-calculated from damageDetections
createdAt: ISO 8601 timestamp — when the claim was saved to DB

otherVehicle.rego: string — AI-detected or manually entered, may be empty
otherVehicle.color: string — AI-detected or manually entered, may be empty
otherVehicle.make: string — AI-detected or manually entered, may be empty
otherVehicle.model: string — AI-detected or manually entered, may be empty

incidentContext.thirdPartyInvolved: boolean | null — was another vehicle involved
incidentContext.hitAndRun: boolean | null — only set when thirdPartyInvolved is true
incidentContext.parkedWhenHit: boolean | null — only set when hitAndRun is true
incidentContext.collisionObject: string — pole | barrier | tree | animal | kerb | other — only set when thirdPartyInvolved is false
incidentContext.atFault: boolean | null — true = at fault, false = not at fault, null = unsure

incident.type: string — collision | rollover | breakdown | hit-and-run | weather-damage | other
incident.description: string — AI-generated or manually entered incident description
incident.timestamp: ISO 8601 timestamp — when the incident occurred

damageDetections._note: Array of damage classes detected by Roboflow. No annotation labels/coordinates, just classes.
damageDetections.class: string — e.g. dent, scratch, broken_light, bumper_damage, bonnet_damage, paint_damage, windshield_damage

photos._note: Each photo links a blob image to the claim. Slots: front, rear, left, right, closeup, wide.
photos.slot: string — which photo slot this belongs to
photos.blobUrl: string — public Azure Blob Storage URL

_severityRules.Minor: scratch, paint_damage, or any other class
